overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene depicting a group of people gathered around a large bonfire on a rooftop at night, with a futuristic neon-lit city skyline featuring distinctive towers visible in the background. The atmosphere is warm and communal, contrasting with the cool cyberpunk cityscape.

segments.scene_description: A static cinematic shot of a rooftop gathering at night, where a group of people sit and stand around a large central bonfire. The warm firelight illuminates the scene while a futuristic neon-lit city skyline with distinctive towers rises in the background. Metal palm-like sculptures frame the scene on both sides, and the atmosphere suggests a communal moment in a cyberpunk setting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, cinematic view of a communal rooftop gathering that contrasts intimate warmth with a sprawling cyberpunk horizon. It begins with a focus on a group of people gathered around a large, central bonfire, where the flickering orange light illuminates their faces against the night. As the eye moves outward, the warmth of the fire blends into the cool glow of a futuristic city skyline featuring distinctive neon-lit towers. The scene is framed by metallic palm-like sculptures on either side, grounding the gathering within its high-tech urban environment.
